{{- /* Include a markdown snippet to a page and render it Usage: {{% snippet "path/to/snippet.md" %}} The path is relative to content/_snippets */ -}} {{- $page := .Page }} {{- with .Get 0 }} {{- with resources.Get (add "/_snippets/" .) }} {{- with resources.ExecuteAsTemplate (path.Join "/dummy" $page.Path $page.Params.h4h.language) $page . }} {{- .Content | htmlUnescape | safeHTML }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Shortcode [ %s ] snippet [ %s ] not found at [ %s ]" $.Name . $.Position }} {{- end }} {{- else }} {{- errorf "Shortcode [ %s ]: snippet [ %s ] not found at [ %s ]" $.Name . $.Position }} {{- end }} {{- /**/ -}}
